description: Guided capture for Surfer feature candidates beyond basic running control.
name: Surfer S2 Feature Scan

steps.prompt: Make sure the Surfer S2 is online and idle. Keep the Aiper app open on the device overview.
Start a manual skimming run in the Aiper app. Leave any progress, duration, or end-time view visible.
Inspect any cleaning progress, history, elapsed time, remaining time, or completion estimate shown in the app.
Inspect any basket, filter, debris, or maintenance state in the app. Do not reset maintenance during this step.
Change the Surfer clean-path preference in the app once if that control is available.
Use pause if the app exposes it; otherwise stop the manual run. Leave the app on the resulting state view.
If the app exposes return, charge, park, or pickup control, trigger it now; otherwise continue without an action.
Leave the device untouched so final REST and MQTT state can settle.
